description: STALE_THRESHOLD=60 defined but never used anywhere — detector uses hardcoded 600s, engine uses STALE_POSITION_TIMEOUT=7200
Surge cooldown hardcoded to 30 — should be config.SURGE_COOLDOWN

description: Resolving market thresholds 0.02/0.98 hardcoded — duplicated in tracker.py

description: Spread threshold 0.15 hardcoded — should be config.MAX_ENTRY_SPREAD

Added config.DATA_RETENTION_DAYS=60, main.py now uses it

description: Trade config snapshot missing SURGE_THRESHOLD, TAKER_FEE_RATE, POSITION_SIZE — needed for backtest accuracy
